name: emelmujiro
description: Emelmujiro - AI Education and Consulting Company Official Website

scripts.dev:backend: cd backend && uv run python manage.py runserver
scripts.test: npm run test:run --workspace=frontend && npm run test:backend
scripts.test:backend: cd backend && DATABASE_URL="" uv run python manage.py test
scripts.lint: npm run lint:frontend && npm run lint:backend
scripts.lint:backend: cd backend && uv run black --check . && uv run flake8
scripts.lint:fix: cd frontend && eslint src --fix && cd ../backend && uv run black .
scripts.clean: npm run clean:frontend && npm run clean:backend
scripts.clean:backend: find backend -type d -name '__pycache__' -exec rm -rf {} + && rm -rf backend/staticfiles
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd backend && uv sync --extra dev
